description.value:
Source: Ariadne's Book of Legends - Alpha v1.2, p. 101.

Heroic Perk: Soul of the World

Prerequisite: Knowledge of Ages

You cannot be surprised while you are conscious. You automatically notice any changes in weather, terrain, or ecosystems within 1 mile. You can understand, read, and write all languages. You can communicate with beasts, elementals, monstrosities, and other natural creatures as though you shared a language. They instinctively recognize you as an eminence and hold certain reverence for you, though they are under no compulsion to heed you if they judge your words unsound or are otherwise hostile toward them.

source.custom: Original en-US text from Alpha v1.2
